subject: Americans are united behind impeachment
body:
Dear Activist,

Beware of the calm before the storm.

**The storm is our enraged president, lashing out over Special Counsel Mueller 's investigation. **And when it gets really quiet, you'll know Mr. Mueller is about to be fired.

We can't that happen. Our dangerous president is not above the law -- the time for impeachment is now.

[**Join us now. Add your name to be a part of our movement demanding impeachment.**](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/xAUMa/6/SP/r5cs/61rcDU/Bqn0wF5FC/P/P)

Thanks to progressives like you across the country, our Need to Impeach movement has grown to over 5,000,000 Americans. But we're not stopping there. We're doubling down and speaking out together to force an absent Congress to take action against our dangerous president and stand with Special Counsel Mueller.

As I travel the country holding town halls with citizens in states from Texas to Pennsylvania, I have been heartened and inspired meeting Americans from all walks of life, all united behind our movement's simple idea:

Donald Trump is a danger to our nation, and he must be impeached.

[**Will you join our movement of more than five million Americans demanding Trump be impeached?**](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/xAUMa/s/SP/r5cs/61rcDU/sSDJmpdaze/P/P)

Obstruction of justice. Collusion with Russia. Provocations of nuclear war. Openly threatening and attacking his political opponents, from the protesters at his rallies to officials at the Department of Justice, including Special Counsel Mueller.

The list of Trump's impeachable offenses grows longer and more serious by the day. The case for impeachment is clear, but history has shown that Congress will not act unless a groundswell of Americans force their hand. [](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/xAUMa/v/S6/r5cs/61rcDU/UBE6wr2h2B/P/P) Together, we are going to make history and save our democracy.

Thanks for being a part of this,

Tom Steyer
---

name: The White House
subject: Statement on Barbara Bush
body:
1600 Daily
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=db2aa345bd4cdb2e8fecf8bfc118ec2727cb9603ccfb3764c54ca931c984cad721091477c52e5e1d1cd49a56359e4ccf7ed9f4e7134d9f2d

The White House - April 18, 2018

Statement on Barbara Bush

Former First Lady Barbara Bush passed away yesterday in Houston, Texas. She was 92.
Along with Abigail Adams, Mrs. Bush is one of only two First Ladies in American history to see a child follow her husband to the U.S. Presidency.

The White House released this statement last night:

President Donald J. Trump and First Lady Melania Trump join the Nation in celebrating the life of Barbara Bush. As a wife, mother, grandmother, military spouse, and former First Lady, Mrs. Bush was an advocate of the American family. Amongst her greatest achievements was recognizing the importance of literacy as a fundamental family value that requires nurturing and protection. She will be long remembered for her strong devotion to country and family, both of which she served unfailingly well. The President and First Lady’s thoughts and prayers are with the family and friends of Mrs. Bush.

The U.S. flag will fly at half-staff until sunset of the day that Mrs. Bush is laid to rest.

Read statements from
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=db2aa345bd4cdb2ee1a630e920664b6bcb1b88eee3f3a866a0f7c2455232656336535e10693125d84f6df9f8362b27d3dd7da3615bd28a4f
the Vice President and Karen Pence and from
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=db2aa345bd4cdb2e26519077087d1db79a3844febc7f1fc3b0636c656dba961dffb7a12774e31b2b35462d99fdd85113b9e84bb5d16dc98f
First Lady Melania Trump.

A close, personal bond

Japanese Prime Minister Shinzo Abe joined President Trump in Florida yesterday. “Shinzo and I have developed a very close relationship,” the President said. “We speak all the time. And our nations, I think, have never been closer than they are right now.”

Abe praised the President’s handling of North Korea. “For the first time in the history of the world, there will be this summit meeting between the United States and North Korea,” the Prime Minister said. “Donald, you’ve demonstrated your unwavering determination in addressing the challenge of North Korea. And I’d like to take this opportunity to express and pay my tribute to your leadership.”

The two leaders also discussed better trade deals. Since President Trump took office, America and Japan have negotiated a series of mutually beneficial deals. Through investment, hiring, and workforce development, Japanese companies support more than 850,000 American jobs. Major Japanese companies such as Toyota and Honda have also invested billions into U.S. factories.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=db2aa345bd4cdb2ec4cbc6e75307446f98f97e98b6c3627ac85a6abecc2c1233714e36d503d3b8fb404aaaf098651a71ea69503c1211febb
Read more about the cherished friendship between the U.S. and Japan.

name: Tom Perez
subject: I'm worried, Derek
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www
body:
It's not enough to cross our fingers and hope that things get better. Nothing will change unless we act.
---
If you've been watching the news lately, you're probably concerned about the future of our democracy. I don't blame you, Derek. I'm worried, too.

But let me be perfectly clear: It's not enough to cross our fingers and hope that things get better. Our country and our politics aren't just going to magically fix themselves. Nothing will change unless we act -- no one else is going to do it for us.

Here's how we can truly hold this president and his administration accountable: take back Congress in November -- full stop.

**If you're committed to achieving that goal -- if you're ready to do everything you can to elect representatives who will stand up to this administration -- today is an important day to show it. Donate $3 right now to help Democrats take back Congress.**

**[ DONATE: $3](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522a15/4067b0a/5d2394f6d/7e403000/3338024781/VEsEAA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/stand-up-to-trump-dnc?amount=3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=25+-+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20180418_tp_nd&source=em_20180418_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180418_tp_nd")
[DONATE: $10](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522a15/4067b0a/5d2394f6d/7e403001/3338024781/VEsEAw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/stand-up-to-trump-dnc?amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=26+-+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20180418_tp_nd&source=em_20180418_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180418_tp_nd")
[DONATE: $25](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522a15/4067b0a/5d2394f6d/7e40300e/3338024781/VEsEAg/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/stand-up-to-trump-dnc?amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=27+-+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20180418_tp_nd&source=em_20180418_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180418_tp_nd")
[DONATE: $50](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522a15/4067b0a/5d2394f6d/7e40300f/3338024781/VEsEDQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/stand-up-to-trump-dnc?amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=28+-+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20180418_tp_nd&source=em_20180418_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180418_tp_nd")
[DONATE: $100](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522a15/4067b0a/5d2394f6d/7e40300c/3338024781/VEsEDA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/stand-up-to-trump-dnc?amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=29+-+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20180418_tp_nd&source=em_20180418_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180418_tp_nd")
[Or donate another amount.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522a15/4067b0a/5d2394f6d/7e40300a/3338024781/VEsFBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-up-to-trump-dnc?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=30+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20180418_tp_nd&source=em_20180418_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180418_tp_nd")
** It's easy to get distracted during these times, but we can't lose sight of the big picture. We need to elect more Democrats to office who will help restore some sanity and integrity to our politics.

We all need to keep our eye on the ball and continue organizing across the country to elect a Democratic Congress, Democratic governors, Democratic state legislatures, Democratic mayors, Democratic city councils, and Democratic school boards. Together we're building an organization that can win up and down the ballot this fall and we're building a bench that can hold Democratic majorities for years to come.

But here's the thing -- none of this is inevitable. People talk about the blue wave, but it's not a thing that will happen unless we make it happen. The Republicans are going to fight tooth and nail to hold on to their majorities, and they're ready to do whatever it takes. Coming up short this November would be disastrous for our country -- but with your help, we will be prepared to take on the GOP and win.

**[This is a critical moment to show that you're standing with Democrats -- that you're willing to take a meaningful stand against Donald Trump and his administration. If you're with me, chip in $3 to show it right now.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522a15/4067b0a/5d2394f6d/7e403016/3338024781/VEsFBA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-up-to-trump-dnc?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=31+-+This+is+a+critical+moment+to+show+that+y&utm_campaign=em_20180418_tp_nd&source=em_20180418_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180418_tp_nd")**

Thank you for your support, Derek. If we don't fight back against this president, who will?

Tom

Tom Perez
Chair
Democratic National Committee

P.S. -- If watching the news makes you feel anxious, you can do something about it. Get out there and tell your friends and family to commit to vote at IWillVote.com, then **[chip in a few bucks to support the DNC's organizing efforts.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522a15/4067b0a/5d2394f6d/7e403015/3338024781/VEsFBw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-up-to-trump-dnc?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=32+-+chip+in+a+few+bucks+to+support+the+DNCs+&utm_campaign=em_20180418_tp_nd&source=em_20180418_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180418_tp_nd")**

Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522a15/4067b0a/5d2394f6d/7e40301c/3338024781/VEsFAQ/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=34+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180418_tp_nd&source=em_20180418_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180418_tp_nd"). Click [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522a15/4067b0a/5d2394f6d/7e40301b/3338024781/VEsFAA/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=35+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180418_tp_nd&source=em_20180418_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180418_tp_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522a15/4067b0a/5d2394f6d/7e403026/3338024781/VEsFAw/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=36+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20180418_tp_nd&source=em_20180418_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180418_tp_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

| Last weekend, we kicked off the **National Week of Action** in a big way! Hoosier Republicans from across the state were knocking doors, making phone calls, and getting trained on how to become leaders in their communities.

And the results were _**HUGE**_ :
---
| | **100 new volunteers trained.
15,000 phone calls made.
2,300 doors knocked.**
---
| **But it doesn't stop there. We're continuing our voter outreach throughout this National Week of Action._If you're looking to make a difference for our party, our candidates, and our shared cause, then now's your time to take a stand_.**

name: Martin Heinrich
subject: degrees not debt
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE
body:
|
---

| | | Team,

Making college accessible and affordable is one of my top priorities in the Senate.

A college education provides a path to an array of career opportunities -- but we must make sure New Mexicans are able to afford college without being crushed by debt.

**[That's why I just introduced the Degrees Not Debt Act in the Senate to make sure higher education is available to every New Mexican without a hefty price tag. But I need your help to make it a reality.](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/s/become-a-citizen-co-sponsor-?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=1+-+Thatrsquos+why+I+just+introduced+the+Deg&utm_campaign=MH_EM_PT_180DO_180418_1_1&source=MH_EM_PT_180DO_180418_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_PT_180DO_180418_1_1")**

The Degrees Not Debt Act reverses many of the massive tax breaks for the wealthy and invests those funds in increasing the Pell Grant to $10,000 a year.

As the cost of attending college has soared over the last decade, the federally funded Pell Grants have failed to keep up. Increasing the value of a Pell Grant is a _critical_ step in making college affordable for New Mexican students and their families.

[**Will you sign on as a citizen co-sponsor of my Degrees Not Debt Act? Add your name here to show Americans are demanding a solution to escalating higher education costs.**](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/s/become-a-citizen-co-sponsor-?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=2+-+Will+you+sign+on+as+a+citizen+cosponsor+&utm_campaign=MH_EM_PT_180DO_180418_1_1&source=MH_EM_PT_180DO_180418_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_PT_180DO_180418_1_1")

You likely know the result of higher education costs. Students and their families are forced to add more and more loans to stay in college. And when they graduate, their mountain of debt takes years to clear.

It's time to invest in the economic future of New Mexico's students.

[**Please, sign on to be a citizen co-sponsor of the Degrees Not Debt Act. Your signature today will show Americans stand behind my bill.**](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/s/become-a-citizen-co-sponsor-?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=3+-+FIRSTNAMEPlease+sign+on+to+be+a+citizen+&utm_campaign=MH_EM_PT_180DO_180418_1_1&source=MH_EM_PT_180DO_180418_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_PT_180DO_180418_1_1")

Thanks for taking action on this important initiative.

Martin

[ADD YOUR NAME ->](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/s/become-a-citizen-co-sponsor-?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=4+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME+rarr&utm_campaign=MH_EM_PT_180DO_180418_1_1&source=MH_EM_PT_180DO_180418_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_PT_180DO_180418_1_1")

| PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE

name: Ben Jealous
subject: Returning Maryland to excellence
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
#
Friend -
Not too long ago, Maryland schools ranked first in the nation. But in recent years we've fallen in the ranks and Governor Hogan has failed to offer a concrete plan to get us back to number one.
As a father of two children in the public school system, I see that too often hard work is not the only determinant of success. Too often, luck plays a determining role in who can achieve a good quality of life and who cannot.
**I 'm running for governor because I believe hard work should be enough for everyone to succeed, and that starts with a good education.**
It's beyond time we fully fund our schools, keep the promises made to ensure casino and lottery funds increase education spending, and that we stand up for all the hardworking educators fighting for our children to have a brighter future.
**Forward this email, and share the video below to endorse our plan to fund our schools and get students the resources they need to succeed.**
[](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a7cd/7ab0e2c4/7fa53953/349a5f2a/1019298733/VEsH/ "https://www.facebook.com/benjealous/videos/10155658750199436/")
**[SHARE ON FACEBOOK](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a7cd/7ab0e2c4/7fa53953/349a5f2a/1019298733/VEsE/ "https://www.facebook.com/benjealous/videos/10155658750199436/")**
Over the weekend, I was thrilled to be endorsed by our state's largest teachers union, the Maryland State Action Association (MSEA). Our campaign received 85% of the vote from more than 300 delegates. MSEA represents 73,000 educators in our great state. Together, with Maryland's teachers, we're going to finally fully fund our schools and ensure every kid gets the education they deserve.
As a civil rights leader, community organizer, I have spent my life bringing people together to get big things done. It's these experiences that have taught me that change begins with leadership that can inspire people to come together to give our young people so much more.
The best thing we can do for the next generation is provide them with the tools they need to shape their destiny. Let's get to work, friend.
Onward,
Ben

**[DONATE](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a7cd/7ab0e2c4/7fa53953/349a5f15/1019298733/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bj-st4-18?refcode=OHQ04188D")**

* * *
PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, [click here](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a7cd/7ab0e2c4/7fa53953/349a5f14/1019298733/VEsC/ "http://act.benjealous.com/page/s/update-your-information?source=emfooter"). Email is one of the most critical tools for our campaign, but you can let us know if you would like to [receive fewer emails](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a7cd/7ab0e2c4/7fa53953/349a5f17/1019298733/VEsD/ "http://act.benjealous.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=emfooter") going forward. Our campaign received 85% of the vote from more than 300 delegates. MSEA represents 73,000 educators in our great state. Together, with Maryland's teachers, we're going to finally fully fund our schools and ensure every kid gets the education they deserve. As a civil rights leader, community organizer, I have spent my life bringing people together to get big things done. It's these experiences that have taught me that change begins with leadership that can inspire people to come together to give our young people so much more. The best thing we can do for the next generation is provide them with the tools they need to shape their destiny. Let's get to work, friend. Onward, Ben "" * PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER

| | Hi Peter,

Some of you may remember me from 2012, when I ran Joe's first campaign for the Senate. I'm very proud of the work we did on that campaign -- we were serious underdogs from the very beginning, and we worked our hearts out to pull ahead in the fall and come out on top. **With the help of tens of thousands of folks just like you, we won -- and Hoosiers sent one of the hardest-working people I 've ever met to represent them in the Senate.**

**Now Joe needs your help again.** Indiana's 2018 Senate contest will be one of the tightest races in the country, so it's critical that Joe knows you're on his side. **[Will you add your name to show him you support his re-election campaign?>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c200c/7377f838/3e44bc4b/51fab047/3507674060/VEsH/ "https://donnelly.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/show-joe-youre-with-him")** | [](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c200c/7377f838/3e44bc4b/51fab047/3507674060/VEsE/ "https://donnelly.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/show-joe-youre-with-him")
---
Back in 2012, I signed up to run Joe's campaign because it was clear to me that Indiana needed an independent voice in the Senate who would fight for working Hoosier families -- and that's exactly what we got in Joe. Just take a look at his record:
* **He defended health care access for working families.**
* **He opposed Mitch McConnell 's disastrous tax plan.**
* **He 's protecting Social Security & Medicare for retirees.**

**But Peter, it could all be for nothing if McConnell and the Koch brothers have their way.** Joe is facing a flood of special interest money, and it's only going to get worse -- especially once Republicans choose their candidate in just three weeks.

Just like in 2012, Joe isn't relying on special interest money for support -- he's relying on people like you, the hard-working folks he fights for in the Senate. **[Add your name -- Joe's in the fight of his political life and he needs to know you're with him.](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c200c/7377f838/3e44bc4b/51fab047/3507674060/VEsF/ "https://donnelly.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/show-joe-youre-with-him")**

This is going to be a tough campaign. But it'll be worth it to keep a hardworking down-to-earth guy like Joe fighting for Hoosiers in the Senate.

Thanks,

Paul Tencher

name: Amanda Brown Lierman, Democrats.org
subject: [AZ-08] This race could be close, Derek
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www
body:
Competing in a district that has heavily favored Republicans takes incredible resources. Split a donation between Dr. Hiral Tipirneni and the DNC right now:
---
If you'd asked me a year ago if I thought Arizona's 8th congressional district was going to be a competitive seat for Democrats, I might have said no. The district has been considered safely Republican for years and Donald Trump won it in 2016 by more than 20 points.

But we've seen in 2018 that any district can be competitive if we go for it. Dr. Hiral Tipirneni has been organizing on the ground and talking to voters directly -- and guess what? Two polls this week have her up or tied.

If we win this race, it would be a huge upset for a Democratic underdog -- the sort of upset we're going to need this November. During these final days of the campaign, it's critical that we help Hiral mobilize as many voters as possible, so I'm asking you today:

**Split a $10 donation between Dr. Hiral Tipirneni and the DNC now. Your donation will help mobilize voters in AZ-08 and elect Democrats nationwide:**

**[ DONATE: $10](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522a23/4067b0a/5d0bf1865/7e4019ac/3624518982/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/help-hiral-win?amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20180418_abl_nd&source=em_20180418_abl_nd&refcode=em_20180418_abl_nd")
[DONATE: $25](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522a23/4067b0a/5d0bf1865/7e4019ad/3624518982/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/help-hiral-win?amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20180418_abl_nd&source=em_20180418_abl_nd&refcode=em_20180418_abl_nd")
[DONATE: $50](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522a23/4067b0a/5d0bf1865/7e4019aa/3624518982/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/help-hiral-win?amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20180418_abl_nd&source=em_20180418_abl_nd&refcode=em_20180418_abl_nd")
[DONATE: $100](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522a23/4067b0a/5d0bf1865/7e4019ab/3624518982/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/help-hiral-win?amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20180418_abl_nd&source=em_20180418_abl_nd&refcode=em_20180418_abl_nd")
[DONATE: $200](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522a23/4067b0a/5d0bf1865/7e4019a8/3624518982/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/help-hiral-win?amount=200&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+DONATE+200&utm_campaign=em_20180418_abl_nd&source=em_20180418_abl_nd&refcode=em_20180418_abl_nd")
[Or donate another amount.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522a23/4067b0a/5d0bf1865/7e4019a9/3624518982/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/help-hiral-win?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20180418_abl_nd&source=em_20180418_abl_nd&refcode=em_20180418_abl_nd")
** The fact that the most recent polls for AZ-08 have Hiral neck and neck with her Republican opponent is something that should make Republicans all across the country nervous. If we can compete in this district, there's literally nowhere Democrats can't put up a fight.

Here's the truth: Hiral is the underdog. But she has a chance.

Competing in a district that has heavily favored Republicans takes an incredible amount of organizing, and the Republican Party isn't going to shy away from pouring an absurd amount of money into the race over the next few days. It's going to take every single one of us to flip our next House seat in Arizona -- and time is running out to make a difference.

**[Split a $10 donation between Dr. Hiral Tipirneni and the DNC to help flip AZ-08 and elect Democrats nationwide.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522a23/4067b0a/5d0bf1865/7e4019b6/3624518982/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/help-hiral-win?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+Split+a+10+donation+between+Dr+Hiral+Tip&utm_campaign=em_20180418_abl_nd&source=em_20180418_abl_nd&refcode=em_20180418_abl_nd")**

Thanks for your support,

Amanda

Amanda Brown Lierman
Political and Organizing Director
Democratic National Committee

clean_body: If McConnell won't stand up to Trump, we will. | "" Friend, Yesterday, Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell announced he's refusing to bring bipartisan legislation to the Senate floor that would protect Special Counsel Robert Mueller's investigation into 2016 election interference. That's right. He's not even considering allowing Senators to debate this on the Senate floor. Make no mistake: The investigation into foreign interference in our elections MUST be guarded from political interference -- including from Trump. But in Mitch McConnell's Senate, the democratic process takes a backseat to party politics. It's hard to watch. "" Americans deserve honest answers. We need to find out exactly what Russia did in the 2016 election so we can prevent it from happening again. And the Senate needs leaders who are ready to hold the Trump administration accountable for steps they may take to interfere in this investigation. The Senate needs leaders who are ready to put the future of our democracy ahead of partisanship. Leaders like Tina. But that won't happen with senators like Mitch McConnell running the show. Democrats can take back control of the Senate this November. We can start holding Trump and his associates accountable. But the path to victory runs right through Minnesota. "" It's time to protect this investigation into foreign interference in our elections. The future of our democratic elections is at stake. Thanks for your support, Team Smith | ""

subject: It's on all of us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom Wolf for Governor
body:
\-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- [](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342eccc1/73a2bc12/3ca19d4d/1fcd2ea7/1763022775/VEsH/ "http://wolfforpa.com") Hello,

In the midst of the #MeToo movement, I'm proud to work for a boss who's actually fighting sexual harassment and assault for all of Pennsylvania.

Earlier this month, Governor Wolf said, "No one should ever be the victim of workplace discrimination or sexual harassment - and we cannot, and will not, accept this behavior as normal or acceptable."

[**I couldn't agree more. That's why I'm standing with Governor Wolf as he works to pass new laws to fight sexual harassment and assault. If you're with him, too, will you share this graphic to let your friends know?**](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342eccc1/73a2bc12/3ca19d4d/1fcd2ea6/1763022775/VEsE/ "https://www.facebook.com/sharer/sharer.php?u=https%3A//s3-us-west-2.amazonaws.com/gps-public-static/tom-wolf/2018/Email/180418ItsOnUs/TomWolf_SocialShare_04172018_1200x628%2BTF.png")
